arts.ttl: CELTIC CONFIDENTIAL: The former favourite who WON'T be coming back to Parkhead, and the faithful defender set to head out in search of first-team football
arts.sum: CELTIC CONFIDENTIAL: Celtic fans have been waiting for news on a potential reunion for fan favourite and the Parkhead faithful after he struggled following his move away from the club.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers uses 'mannequins' analogy as he expands on his Celtic crowd criticism
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers will continue to voice his opinion on issues that concern him despite the negative reaction to his Celtic crowd comments.

arts.ttl: Why Ibrox coin incident bolstered Arne Engels' belief in Celtic's title credentials
arts.sum: Arne Engels has revealed why the fallout to the Ibrox coin incident last week heartened him - and increased his belief in Celtic's title credentials.

arts.ttl: Jota sees Rennes transfer exit route open as Celtic diehards dream of return for winger who loves the Hoops 'for life'
arts.sum: The winger only joined Rennes last summer but has struggled to hold down a regular place with the Ligue 1 side

arts.ttl: 'The best...' BBC pundit says Greg Taylor can do something at Celtic that Kieran Tierney can't
arts.sum: “I think Greg Taylor, in Scotland anyway, is probably the best playing that role,” said Bonner about Taylor coming into midfield. Pat Bonner thinks, in the Premiership, Taylor is ‘the best playing that role’ and that’s where he triumphs Tierney, as he told BBC Radio Scotland .

arts.ttl: Europa League champions 'already admire' big-money Celtic star
arts.sum: Europa League champions 'already admire' big-money Celtic star.

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Dundee Utd: TV channel, kick-off time, team news, referee & VAR
arts.sum: Celtic take on Dundee United on Wednesday evening as Brendan Rodgers looks to record a second Scottish Premiership victory of 2025 on home soil. With Rangers drawing away to Hibernian in the early kick-off, Celtic have moved 13 points clear at the top of the Scottish Premiership and have a chance to extend that margin by a further three against Dundee United.

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney Arsenal stats make fools of Celtic doubters over injury prone tag
arts.sum: Kieran Tierney’s scoring record at Arsenal amid Celtic rumours The Scotland fullback has made no secret of the fact that he would one day like to return to Parkhead and ever since Arsenal decided not to renew Tierney’s contract, the rumours have been rife that it could actually happen.

arts.ttl: Serial Celtic transfer stalkers are back as Arne Engels is 'monitored' after Matt O'Riley miss
arts.sum: Atalanta missed out after several attempts to land O'Riley but now Belgian record club buy is on their radar

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney Arsenal latest with cup tie inclusion amid Celtic links
arts.sum: Kieran Tierney on Arsenal bench amid Celtic transfer links.
